notes: Same 3 assertions differentiate: severity_classification, smell_categories, density_rating
Core.Domain baseline used correct taxonomy names, narrowing delta to 2 assertions
Baseline consistently found practical runtime issues (thread safety, memory leaks, missing notifications) that the skill missed
Skill consistently found cross-cutting architectural patterns (Shotgun Surgery, blast radius analysis) that baseline missed
Both found the same high-severity issues in every eval
